title: Zapier - Any Column Change
excerpt:

posts.author: celloshred (Michael Wolff)
posts.cookedHtml:
Since there is only the option to trigger on a specific column or all columns,

Is there any way to determine WHICH field was changed? This way inside of Zapier I could condition for a zap to continue only if specific columns have changed.

Also, in the “available fields”, I see field names like “1. Text 1…” and “1. Event Text 1…”. I’m assuming it’s the same field and “event” is related to the trigger but can’t find any documentation to know the difference or how to use it.
